transformation_chain.name: SQ_CG1_MTL_DEMAND
transformation_chain.description: This source qualifier to read the source rows from MTL_DEMAND.

CG1_MTL_DEMAND.LINE_ITEM_QUANTITY, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.PRIMARY_UOM_QUANTITY, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.COMPLETED_QUANTITY, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.REQUIREMENT_DATE, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.RESERVATION_TYPE, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.LAST_UPDATED_BY, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.CREATION_DATE, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.CREATED_BY, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.DEMAND_SOURCE_LINE, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.DEMAND_SOURCE_DELIVERY, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.EXTERNAL_SOURCE_LINE_ID, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.USER_LINE_NUM, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.USER_DELIVERY, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.SCHEDULE_ID, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.AUTODETAIL_GROUP_ID, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.SUPPLY_SOURCE_TYPE, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.SUPPLY_SOURCE_HEADER_ID, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.SUPPLY_GROUP_ID, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.UPDATED_FLAG, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.REVISION, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.LOT_NUMBER, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.SERIAL_NUMBER, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.ROW_STATUS_FLAG, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.ORDER_CHANGE_REPORT_FLAG, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.ATP_LEAD_TIME, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.EXPLOSION_EFFECTIVITY_DATE, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.BOM_LEVEL, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.MRP_DATE, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.MRP_QUANTITY, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.CUSTOMER_ID, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.TERRITORY_ID, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.MASTER_RESERVATION_QTY, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.DESCRIPTION, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.ATTRIBUTE1, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.ATTRIBUTE2, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.ATTRIBUTE3, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.ATTRIBUTE4, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.ATTRIBUTE5, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.ATTRIBUTE6, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.ATTRIBUTE7, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.ATTRIBUTE8, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.ATTRIBUTE9, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.ATTRIBUTE10, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.ATTRIBUTE11, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.ATTRIBUTE12, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.ATTRIBUTE13, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.ATTRIBUTE14, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.ATTRIBUTE15, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.DEMAND_TYPE, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.DUPLICATED_CONFIG_ITEM_ID, CG1_MTL_DEMAND.DUPLICATED_CONFIG_DEMAND_ID,
